content:
<[[TKC1VG2I]]>Team Lead Digital Analytics

Requirements
- Experience leading digital analytics initiatives
- Experience managing a team of at least 3 people
- Minimum 5 years of experience in digital analytics
- Strong experience with Google Stack (GA4, GTM, BigQuery, Looker Studio, Google Cloud)



Bonus- Experience with server-side tracking (GTM Server-Side / Meta CAPI)</[[TKC1VG2I]]>
